title: Storyboard Prototype
description: Metadata for a storyboard prototype. Place this file in your prototype directory as `name.prototype.json`.

meta.description: Prototype metadata displayed in the viewfinder and prototype chrome.

description.description: Short description shown in the viewfinder.

author.description: GitHub username(s) of the author(s). Can be a single string or an array.

tags.description: Tags for filtering and organization in the viewfinder.

team.description: Team name associated with this prototype.

hideFlows.description: When true, hides the flows menu for this prototype.

url.description: For external prototypes: the URL to open in a new tab. When set, this prototype links externally instead of rendering locally.
